The Reserve Bank of India announced that it will maintain the current repo rate amid concerns of global inflation fluctuations. Economists say the decision is expected to stabilize borrowing costs while supporting gradual economic growth.
An online video falsely claims that India is planning to ban all mobile phones above ₹5,000 due to radiation concerns. The Department of Telecommunications has clarified that no such proposal exists.

Reports circulating online say that drinking raw turmeric juice can instantly cure COVID-19 infections. Health experts warned that there is no scientific proof and urged people not to follow unverified home remedies.

Japan experienced a 5.1-magnitude earthquake off the eastern coast on Saturday. Authorities confirmed that there was no tsunami threat and no major damage was reported. Emergency services remain on standby.
